rankings.title: What’s in a Label? Education Priority Zones, School Quality Signals, and Housing Markets in France
conditions: verifying catchment-boundary stability 2014–2016
pre-registering the placebo/boundary battery
showing clean event-study dynamics around 2015 for switcher vs non-switcher boundaries

rankings.title: The Private School Escape Valve: How Outside Options Mediate the Capitalization of Education Priority Labels
Does Halving Class Sizes Capitalize into Housing Prices? Evidence from France’s Dédoublement Policy
conditions: a boundary-based design around REP/REP+ elementary catchments or eligibility thresholds
strong event-study pre-trends
a clear “first stage” showing realized class-size changes by school-year actually occurred as measured

rankings.title: Gateway to the Elite: How CPGE Proximity Shapes Local Housing Markets in France
Idea 3: The Private School Escape Valve: How Outside Options Mediate the Capitalization of Education Priority Labels
conditions: verifying sufficient transaction density at boundaries to power a triple-diff
establishing strict pre-trend checks across high/low private school areas
